def negative_python_perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_same_process():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_serialization_base64_roundtrip_same_process"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag base64 encode/decode roundtrips inside one process boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
